title: Gorgeous Optimizations
description: This is a modpack filled with the perfect optimisation mods to get you from 30 FPS to 200 FPS!
body: "Gorgeous Optimisations" is a modpack focused on improving Minecraft's performance while adding beautiful visuals and quality-of-life features. It combines powerful performance mods like Sodium and Lithium, with visually appealing additions like shaders and customizable particles, providing a smooth and enhanced gaming experience without sacrificing beauty.
